## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Samantha Olinger for the Engagement Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Saved a landscaping client from churn** by offering a 3-month beta test of a new LLM visibility tool, directly addressing their stated need for AI capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**Proactive account management prevents churn** by meticulously tracking usage patterns and asking strategic questions to uncover hidden client needs before they become problems.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [**Building a leadership track record** by creating and sharing resources for niche client problems, which positions Samantha as a go-to expert.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [**The company is transitioning** from a services-only model to a product-first one (platform launch early 2025), requiring new client health metrics and delivery models.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

## Topics

### Client Renewal Case Study

  - [**Problem:** A landscaping client, despite recent project success (site migration, 4 acquisitions), planned to churn for an agency offering a broader scope.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The client's leadership wanted AI capabilities for brand mentions and citations, a need not communicated by the day-to-day contact.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Solution:** Offered the client a free 3-month beta test of a new, unlaunched LLM visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [**Goal:** Partner with the client to build the tool's initial workflow and playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Focus:** Used the tool to research winter-specific terms (e.g., "snow removal"), a known client pain point.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The client renewed, keeping Samantha's team for organic work and hiring the agency for paid media, creating a collaborative partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Account Management Philosophy

  - [**Proactive Discovery:** Meticulously tracks client usage patterns to differentiate normal fluctuations from true red flags.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**Strategic Questioning:** Asks "why" behind client topics to uncover underlying struggles before they escalate.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [**Leadership Development:** Building a track record by creating and sharing resources for niche client problems, positioning Samantha as an expert.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

### Company Context & Challenges

  - [**Business Model Transition:** Shifting from a services-only model to a product-first one.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Product:** A new platform (LLM/SEO visibility, content creation) launches early 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Future Delivery:** Will offer both self-serve platform access and managed services.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [**Current Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [**Perceived Value:** The services-only model is often valued less than a product.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Expectation Setting:** Learning to identify and avoid clients with unrealistic expectations (e.g., overnight results, complex review processes).](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget:** Discuss the interview with Andy and Marilia.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [**Bridget:** Follow up with Samantha on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/oU7B4ZyfL2hkgugPSvwWqd1QZPbxkmgc?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
